---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Time Series Lagging Features"
image: social-cards/time-series-lag.png
---

# 🏗️ Lagging Features {#sec-time-series-lag}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Lagging Features
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
